ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone for the client */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the client's website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Level of subscription for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the website */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the website was added to the system */,
  "site_category" TEXT /* Category of the website */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the website */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "known" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visitor is known (TRUE) or unknown (FALSE) */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last visit */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Count of unique visits by this IP address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the visitor */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the visitor */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type used by the visitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic record */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor associated with this traffic data */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being accessed */,
  "pages_visited" INTEGER /* Number of pages visited during the session */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Count of hits recorded during the session */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Amount of bandwidth consumed during the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "entry_page" TEXT /* First page visited in the session */,
  "exit_page" TEXT /* Last page visited in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report in a text format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for platform login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID indicating the user's role */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., suspicious activity) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report schedule */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the report is scheduled */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report scheduled (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report is scheduled to run */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the scheduled report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_schedules_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report that was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the export occurred */,
  "exported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES analytics_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_exported_by FOREIGN KEY ("exported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
